```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">practice 03</div>
 <div style="font-size:1.3em;font-weight:700;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.9em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">
  Use context <span style="color:#2C8475;">resets</span>, not <span style="color:#D45F47;">compaction</span>.
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:stretch;gap:0;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);text-align:left;margin-bottom:1em;">

  <div style="flex:1;background:#FCEEEC;padding:0.85em 1em;border-right:2px dashed #F2B5A8;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#7A2418;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.35em;">✕ compact</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">
    In-place compaction creates <strong style="color:#D45F47;">"context anxiety"</strong>. Model senses fill, wraps up early.
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="flex:1;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.85em 1em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#1F5E54;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.35em;">✓ reset</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">
    Clear context. Re-read <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#1F5E54;background:#F8F7F0;padding:0.05em 0.35em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.95em;">SPEC.md</code> + <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#1F5E54;background:#F8F7F0;padding:0.05em 0.35em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.95em;">STATE.md</code> fresh.
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:0.4em;flex-wrap:wrap;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;">
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;align-self:center;">when to reset:</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">between sprints</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">cutting corners</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">same mistake twice</span>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.7em;font-size:0.58em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  This is <strong style="color:#5654A2;font-style:normal;">why</strong> the harness is built around files.
 </div>

</div>
```
